channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Android’s Emergency SOS just gave one Pixel owner my worst privacy nightmare – here’s how to avoid similar embarrassment
item.description: Emergency SOS caused one user major embarrassment when it shared a video of them naked – here’s how to make sure that doesn’t happen to you.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Black IT leaders weigh in on what DEI means for IT
item.description: An increasing number of companies in the technology sector and beyond are ending or scaling back diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs despite research that has shown that DEI efforts have a positive impact on business outcomes.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The NBA's tech summit turns 25 this year, and its return to the Bay Area is a full-circle moment
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver had no idea 25 years ago that the Tech Summit would turn into much of anything, much less one of the hottest tickets at All-Star weekend.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Juniper CEO: ‘I am disappointed and somewhat puzzled’ by DOJ merger rejection
item.description: Few would have predicted the U.S. Department of Justice would move to block HPE’s proposed acquisition of Juniper Networks. When it happened late last month, the two vendors and many industry watchers were caught off guard.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Arm secures Meta as first customer in chip push, challenging industry giants
item.description: In a landmark shift, Arm has secured Meta as the first major customer for its internally designed server CPUs, a move that signals its entry into direct chip sales and places it in direct competition with its biggest customers, including Qualcomm and Nvidia.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How AI is empowering tech leaders
item.description: When it comes to IT procurement, “time is money” is an understatement. For many organizations, the procurement process eats up six to nine months — an expensive exercise in a time of digital transformation, when both tech agility and organizational leadership define business success.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Buckle up for faster Python programs
item.description: In this edition of our biweekly Python newsletter: The next version of Python brings an all-new variety of speed boost. Python packages may soon pack better labeling for their ingredients. Cython 3.1 tees up new features for converting Python to C.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Scout Motors' effort to directly sell its electric SUVs where they'll make them stalls
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Legislation to let Volkswagen-backed Scout Motors sell its electric SUVs directly to people in South Carolina, where the vehicles will be built, has stalled after fierce opposition from traditional automobile dealers.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Adobe Firefly expands with ‘commercially safe’ video generator
item.description: Adobe has released a video generator in public beta in its generative AI (genAI) tool, Adobe Firefly. The company calls the tool the first “commercially safe” video generator on the market.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk says he'll withdraw $97.4 billion bid for OpenAI if ChatGPT maker remains nonprofit
item.description: Elon Musk says he will abandon his $97.4 billion offer to buy the nonprofit behind OpenAI if the ChatGPT maker drops its plan to convert into a for-profit company. “If OpenAI, Inc.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Juniper unveils EX4000 access switches to simplify enterprise network operations
item.description: Juniper has expanded its access layer options with a new switch family it says will help customers use automation and AI-based support to streamline enterprise operations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox host: Musk needs to be transparent about 'billions' in government contract
item.description: Fox News host Jessica Tarlov knocked billionaire Elon Musk over what she said is a lack of transparency he is displaying amid efforts to make widespread changes to the size of the federal government on President Trump's behalf.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: HPE expands ProLiant server portfolio, boosts AI and security features
item.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) added eight new servers to its ProLiant Gen 12 server portfolio, bringing advanced security and AI-optimization features to enterprise customers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to not fall in love with AI-powered romance scammers
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to protect yourself against artificial intelligence-fueled romance scams, which have become the most common type of fraud in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Don’t use public ASP.NET keys (duh), Microsoft warns
item.description: Microsoft Threat Intelligence in December observed a “threat actor” using a publicly available ASP.NET machine key to inject malicious code and fetch the Godzilla post-exploitation framework, a “backdoor” web shell used by intruders to execute commands and manipulate files.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: On average, state cyber leaders are leaving their positions sooner
item.description: The National Association of State CIOs and Deloitte outlined five calls to action in a recent survey of state chief information security officers. The post On average, state cyber leaders are leaving their positions sooner first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Reset what you see on social media
item.description: Here's how to take control of the algorithms on Facebook, YouTube, Instagram and TikTok if your social media feeds aren't showing you content you want to see.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cisco doubles down on AI with new, updated certifications
item.description: Cisco this week furthered its commitment to help customers support and develop artificial intelligence systems by rolling out new certification and training courses aimed at teaching professionals everything from how to incorporate AI into specific roles to advanced networking design.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: IP Fabric expands network visibility, automation with platform update
item.description: As modern networking deployments across the cloud and edge become increasingly complex, it can be a non-trivial exercise for teams to get proper visibility.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The cloud giants stumble
item.description: Recent financial results from the major cloud providers reveal a concerning trend in cloud adoption and growth. AWS reported just 13% growth in the final quarter of 2023, Microsoft Azure saw 19% growth, and Google Cloud achieved 26% growth—all below market expectations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: ESA’s space telescope Euclid discovers ‘astonishing' Einstein ring
item.description: The European Space Agency's Euclid space telescope was going through preliminary tests in September 2023 when it captured images of an Einstein Ring in a nearby galaxy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FPGAs lose luster in genAI era
item.description: In a world gone mad over GPUs for AI acceleration, FPGA processors are seeing limited adoption in the data center for genAI workloads, with their primary use still in embedded markets and edge AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World
